name: repository_layer_audit

issues.description: Method update_credits() does not exist in any repository - will cause AttributeError at runtime
issues.impact: 500 error when trying to update credits for AI services or tariff purchases

issues.description: Method update_status() does not exist in PlacementRequestRepository - will cause AttributeError
issues.impact: 500 error when updating placement request status to pending_payment

issues.description: Method update_status() does not exist in PlacementRequestRepository
issues.impact: 500 error when updating placement status after counter-offer

issues.description: Method get_history() does not exist in ReputationScoreRepository - will cause AttributeError
issues.impact: 500 error when fetching user reputation history

issues.description: Method get_history() does not exist in ReputationScoreRepository
issues.impact: 500 error in admin endpoint for reputation history

issues.description: Direct SQL query in router instead of using repository - violates architecture
issues.impact: Code duplication, harder to test, violates separation of concerns

issues.description: Direct SQL query in health router
Direct SQL query in health router
Direct SQL query in health router
Direct SQL query in health router

issues.impact: Minor - but inconsistent with repository pattern

issues.description: Direct SQL for pagination count instead of repository method

notes: 5 CRITICAL issues: missing repository methods that will cause 500 errors at runtime
health.py router has 5 direct SQL queries that should use repositories
placements.py uses session.get() directly in 5 places - should use repo.get_by_id()
feedback.py and disputes.py use session.execute() for pagination - should use repo methods
update_status() method needs to be added to PlacementRequestRepository
update_credits() method needs to be added to UserRepository
get_history() method needs to be added to ReputationScoreRepository
